localization.meta.title: Localization Tool
localization.title: Localization Tool
localization.description: Manage local translations, compare JSON files, and choose what to merge.
localization.search.locked: Save or cancel your current edits before searching again.
localization.empty.editLocal: Local translation file tabs, search results, and editable text boxes will appear here later.
localization.empty.compareMerge: Comparison results, checkboxes, red difference highlights, and merge actions will appear here later.
localization.empty.settings: Localization workspace-specific settings will appear here later.
localization.tabs.empty: No translation JSON files were found yet.
localization.errors.readFailed: Could not read or parse the selected translation file.
localization.errors.saveFailed: Failed to save the selected translation file.
localization.rows.empty: This file has no displayable entries.
localization.rows.searchPrompt: Type a search query, or click View All to show every entry.
localization.compare.loadPrompt: Load a compare JSON file to view differences and choose which fields to merge.
localization.compare.noMatches: There are no comparison results to display with the current filters.
localization.compare.noLocalFile: Please select a local translation file tab first.
localization.compare.invalidJson: Could not read or parse the compare JSON file.
localization.settings.visibility.uiJsons: Show or hide the UI and search JSON rows in Edit Local and Compare / Merge.
